description.hr: MAJOR RELEASE: Payload CMS Integracija. Sustav prebačen na SQLite bazu, automatiziran uvoz podataka (seeding), uvedena kolekcija VINA ASORTIMAN.
description.en: MAJOR RELEASE: Payload CMS Integration. System migrated to SQLite database, automated data seeding, introduced VINA ASORTIMAN collection.

description.hr: UI/UX Poliranje - dodana BackToTop komponenta, hibridna navigacija.
description.en: UI/UX Polishing - added BackToTop component, hybrid navigation.
